Landscape
Design

Curated plantings, irrigation, sod, mulch beds, flagstone paths, and full property makeovers. Designed for Raleigh's climate. Built for the long view.

Washing

Driveways, siding, decks, fences, patios. Years of grime gone in a single afternoon.

🍂

Full debris removal, downspout flushing, and a no-clog guarantee. Protect your foundation, fascia, and roof — before the next storm hits.

03 — How it works

From call to finished in four steps.

i

Call us

Dial 919-961-3312 and tell us what you're picturing. Five-minute call, zero pressure.

ii

Walk the property

We meet you on-site, take measurements, listen carefully, and sketch the possibilities.

iii

See the plan

You get a clear scope, honest pricing, and a timeline. No surprises, no upsells.

iv

We build it

Our crew shows up on time, treats your home like ours, and leaves the site cleaner than we found it.

04 — Why us

A crew that actually shows up.

We started New Horizon because every homeowner in Raleigh deserves a contractor who picks up the phone, shows up when they say they will, and builds work they're proud to put their name on. That's not a sales line. That's the bar.
